              + setUser1Id()

              + setUser1Name()

              + setUser2Id()

              + setUser2Name()

            }
          }
          package "message" {
            class Message << (A,#50C878) >> {
              - id : String
              - type : String

              - sender : String
              + Message()

              + getContent()
              + setContent()
              + getStatus()

            class LocationMessage << (C,#50C878) >> {

            class TextMessage << (C,#50C878) >> {

              - longitude : double
              + Location()

              + setLatitude()
              + getLongitude()
              + setLongitude()
            }
          }
          package "user" {
            class User << (C,#50C878) >> {

              - borrowedBooks : Map<String, BorrowedBook>
